title: astragalus lagobromus
intro: Astragalus lagobromus, also known as milk vetch, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus lagobromus include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus lagobromus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural defenses.
